EchterAlsFake GitHub
Ecosystem Portal · Asynchronous

EAF Porn API Ecosystem

Welcome to the central portal for the EchterAlsFake Porn API wrapper ecosystem. Here you will find the centralized indices and complete documentations for all 15+ site scrapers and their shared core networking engine.

🔍
Showing 16 of 16 APIs

🏗️ Core Engine

The foundation of the entire ecosystem. Rather than duplicating network requests, connection pooling, and downloader configurations, all site-specific scrapers build directly on top of eaf_base_api.

EAF
Base API v3.3.3

The core asynchronous networking engine for all EchterAlsFake scrapers and API wrappers. Handles HTTP sessions, bot bypasses, retries, HLS downloading, and caching.

$ pip install eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub

🌐 Site API Scrapers

Individual, lightweight Python API wrappers tailored for specific platforms. They share a consistent interface design, return lazy-loaded media objects, and offer robust HLS media download features.

B
Beeg API v1.5

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Beeg. Fetch video metadata by parsing external API endpoints, and download streams via HLS. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-beeg git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
E
Eporner API v2.3

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Eporner. Fetch video details via API and HTML endpoints, download files directly with multi-threaded range requests, and retrieve pornstar biographies. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-eporner git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
H
HQPorner API v2.3

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for HQPorner. Fetch videos, metadata, search, get videos by actress or category, and download content — all powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-hqporner git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
M
MissAV API v2.3

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for MissAV. Fetch JAV video metadata and download streams via HLS. Features Recombee-powered search with HMAC-signed API requests. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-missav git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
P
PornHub API v5.2

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Pornhub. Fetch videos, GIFs, shorts, albums, playlists, pornstars, models, channels, and user profiles — with full account login support. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-pornhub git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
P
Porntrex API v1.6

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Porntrex. Fetch video metadata, channel information, and model profiles, run search queries, and download media via direct CDN links. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-porntrex git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
R
Redtube API v1.2

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Redtube. Fetch video details, custom playlists, publishers channels, users, and pornstars. Stream downloads via HLS. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-redtube git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
S
SpankBang API v2.2.2

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for SpankBang. Fetch videos, metadata, search, and iterate over channels, creators, or pornstars. Download content using HLS or direct RAW MP4 downloads. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-spankbang git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
T
Thumbzilla API v1.1

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Thumbzilla. Fetch video metadata, playlists, pornstar biographies, amateur profiles, and studio channels. Stream downloads via HLS with auto-constructed master playlists. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-thumbzilla git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
T
Tube8 API v1.1

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for Tube8. Fetch video metadata, pornstar biographies, amateur profiles, and studio channels. Stream downloads via HLS with auto-constructed master playlists. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-tube8 git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
X
XFreeHD API v1.5

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for XFreeHD. Fetch video metadata, photo albums, execute search queries, and download media files directly from CDNs. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-xfreehd git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
X
xHamster API v2.3

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for xHamster. Fetch video details, shorts, channel information, pornstar metadata, or log into user accounts. Stream downloads via HLS. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-xhamster git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
X
XNXX API v2.2

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for XNXX. Fetch videos, metadata, search with complex filters, and iterate over user uploads — all powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-xnxx git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
X
XVideos API v2.3

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for XVideos. Fetch videos, metadata, pornstar profiles, channels, playlists, and download content — all powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-xvideos git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
Y
YouPorn API v1.6

A fully asynchronous high-speed Python API wrapper and scraper for YouPorn. Fetch video details, custom collections, publisher channels, user uploads, and pornstar metadata. Supports dual streaming modes (HLS and raw MP4). Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-youporn git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
Open Documentation GitHub
🔍

No APIs found matching your search

Try searching for a different keyword or checking the filter buttons.

✨ Shared Ecosystem Features

Across all of these packages, you can expect a unified, robust experience built to support modern, high-throughput scraper systems.

⚡

Async-First Design

Fully built around Python's asyncio. Integrates perfectly with modern asynchronous web backends (FastAPI, Sanic) and concurrent task queues (Celery, Arq).

🛡️

Bot Challenge Bypasses

Utilizes curl_cffi under the hood to bypass complex anti-bot measures, replicating browser TLS signatures and solving JS puzzles automatically.

📥

Advanced HLS Downloader

Features multi-threaded segment downloading, automatic stream quality selection, resume points, cancel events, and automated remuxing from TS to MP4 via PyAV.

🌀

Lazy-Loaded Models

Wrapper models load data incrementally. Fetch a video object instantly and let it load heavy details (like tags or streams) only when they are accessed.

⚙️

RuntimeConfig Tuning

Configure proxy rotations, retry behaviors, bandwidth throttling, connection limits, DNS over HTTPS, and custom request headers universally across all clients.

💥

Unified Errors

All API wrappers raise subclassed exceptions originating from a common error hierarchy, making global catch blocks robust and predictable.

⚠️ Legal Disclaimer

⚠️ Disclaimer Policy
These packages are unofficial, independent projects and are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the target websites. This software is provided "as is" for educational and personal purposes only. The developer assumes no responsibility for any consequences arising from the use of these tools, including but not limited to account suspension, IP blocking, or any violation of the target website's Terms of Service. Users are solely responsible for ensuring their use complies with all applicable laws and policies. Use at your own risk.
